detectors.description:
Reentrancy in DOMO._transfer(address,address,uint256) (DOMO.sol#659-783):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (DOMO.sol#723)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (DOMO.sol#797-809)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (DOMO.sol#729)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (DOMO.sol#817)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (DOMO.sol#781)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (DOMO.sol#943)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (DOMO.sol#923)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (DOMO.sol#925)
	DOMO._rOwned (DOMO.sol#329) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DOMO._takeTeam(uint256) (DOMO.sol#937-945)
	- DOMO._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (DOMO.sol#897-933)
	- DOMO.balanceOf(address) (DOMO.sol#485-489)
	- DOMO.constructor() (DOMO.sol#419-449)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (DOMO.sol#781)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (DOMO.sol#951)
	DOMO._rTotal (DOMO.sol#343) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DOMO._getCurrentSupply() (DOMO.sol#1093-1103)
	- DOMO._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (DOMO.sol#949-955)
	- DOMO.constructor() (DOMO.sol#419-449)
	- DOMO.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (DOMO.sol#581-603)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [DOMO._transfer(address,address,uint256)](DOMO.sol#L659-L783):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](DOMO.sol#L723)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](DOMO.sol#L797-L809)
	External calls sending eth:

		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount)](DOMO.sol#L817)

		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](DOMO.sol#L943)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](DOMO.sol#L923)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](DOMO.sol#L925)
	[DOMO._rOwned](DOMO.sol#L329) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [DOMO._takeTeam(uint256)](DOMO.sol#L937-L945)
	- [DOMO._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](DOMO.sol#L897-L933)
	- [DOMO.balanceOf(address)](DOMO.sol#L485-L489)
	- [DOMO.constructor()](DOMO.sol#L419-L449)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](DOMO.sol#L781)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](DOMO.sol#L951)
	[DOMO._rTotal](DOMO.sol#L343) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [DOMO._getCurrentSupply()](DOMO.sol#L1093-L1103)
	- [DOMO._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](DOMO.sol#L949-L955)
	- [DOMO.constructor()](DOMO.sol#L419-L449)
	- [DOMO.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](DOMO.sol#L581-L603)
